en: The teacher is here.

ab: Aka to pihalama, kalikien a maro’ i kamaro’an.
ch: B:不要再玩了，快坐在座位上。
en: Stop playing and quickly sit in your seat.
Sorry, I’m late!
Come in quickly.
What day is it today?

ab: O sakalima no lipay anini, pahanhan to anocila, ata malacafay a mihalama!
ch: B:今天星期五，明天放假，一起出去玩吧!
en: It’s Friday today, we have a day off tomorrow. Let’s go out and play together!
Great! Let’s go to the riverside.
What day will it be tomorrow?

ab: O sakatolo no lipay anocila, mihalama kita to mali to herek no lahok no cila!
ch: B:明天星期三，我們明天下午去玩球吧!
en: Tomorrow will be Wednesday. Let’s go play ball tomorrow afternoon!
What will you be doing tomorrow morning?

ab: O pilipayan anocila, tatayra kako ato wina i kiwkay.
ch: B:明天是星期日，我要和媽媽去教會。
en: Tomorrow will be Sunday, I will be going to church with my mom.
What’s wrong?

ab: Sakaota’aw sanay kako, tayra ho kako i tata’ian.
en: I feel like vomiting. I need to go to the restroom.
I feel dizzy.
Lie down and rest.

ab: Singsi, adada ko tiyad ako, tayra ho kako i tata’ian.
ch: A:老師，我肚子痛，要去廁所。
en: Teacher, I have a stomachache. I need to go to the restroom.
Okay, go quickly.

ab: Manga’ay kako minanaw to kamay han?
en: May I go wash my hands?
It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: Singsi, adada ko fongoh ako, mamipahanhan kako to herek no lahok.
ch: A:老師，我頭好痛，下午要請假。
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.
Okay, take care and go home.

ab: Singsi, wa mamipahanhan kako to anocila a sakacecay no lipay, wa mamipaising kako.
ch: A:老師，我下禮拜一要請假，我要去看醫生。
en: Teacher, I need to take a sick leave next Monday. I have to see a doctor.
Alright, take care of yourself.
Where is Panay?

ab: Adadaay ko tiyad ningra, Ira i tata’ian cingra.
en: She has a stomachache. She’s in the restroom.
Where is Kacaw?

ab: Singsi, adadaay ko takolaw ni Kacaw, pahanhanay anini.
en: Teacher, Kacaw has a sore throat. She took a sick leave today.
Why didn’t Panay come?
She has a fever.
